concept.theme_description: Focus on the intricate details of various flowers

color_scheme: Pops of vibrant hues (reds, blues, purples)
visual_elements.texture: Layered watercolor washes with varying opacities
visual_elements.brushwork: Fluid, overlapping strokes without defined outlines
elements: Droplets and splashes evocative of nectar and dew

concept.artistic_goal: Capture the ethereal beauty of diverse floral details. Emphasize fluidity and subtle textures to evoke an immersive garden experience.
